title: [AI5] Launch Agentars Web-Based Interface
summary: No first-party Agentars web interface or launchable Agentars app was found in the TNF workspace. Search results only found generic avatar references, Agentverse concept documentation, and AgentArena smoke-test URLs.

checks.command: rg -n "agentars|agentar|agent avatar|web-based interface|web based interface|Agentars" -S apps packages src scripts docs --glob '!**/node_modules/**' --glob '!apps/external/**'
rg --files apps packages src scripts docs | rg -i 'agentar|avatar|interface|agent.*web'
checks.notes: No launchable Agentars app path found.

next_steps: Provide the concrete Agentars repo/app path if this directive refers to an external project.
Otherwise reclassify this AI5 extraction as non-dispatchable for TNF.
